ops.body: Spike gate PASSED (4x headroom): warm wazero path ~1.29ms p50 / ~1.8ms p95 vs the 5ms budget; cold compile ~17.5ms; per-call ~0.43ms; .wasm 57KB (opt-z, lto, strip, panic=abort, cdylib); compiled-cache artifact ~215KB. wazero v1.12.0, rustc 1.88.0, Go 1.26.1. LOAD-BEARING for release design: (1) PASS requires the wazero COMPILER engine — interpreter fallback is ~23ms warm, cannot use the disk cache, and fails the gate; guard the release so ccx never ships interpreter-only. (2) CI must rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown. (3) Locate the .wasm via cargo build --message-format=json or CARGO_TARGET_DIR (user config redirects target dirs). (4) Zero host imports (no WASI wiring) as long as the crate does no I/O and keeps panic=abort. (5) Consider pre-populating the compilation cache at install/release or the first invocation eats the ~17ms cold compile. Corpus exported: 157 vectors in format-core/corpus/ from 21 Go test tables; 32 typed-IR-only cases deferred to crate-native unit tests.
